debug_info.goal:
a✝ : GamePos
bt : BuildTree a✝
α : Program
φ : Formula
δ : List Program
π : PreState a✝ bt
⊢ ¬α.isAtomic → (~⌈α⌉φ) ∈ PreState.forms a✝ bt π → ∃ Xδ ∈ H α, Xδ.1 ∪ [~⌈⌈δ⌉⌉φ] ⊆ PreState.forms a✝ bt π
